name: log-stream
title: Log Stream
description: Bounded, color-coded log view that tails like `tail -f`. Drops oldest on capacity overflow, filters by level, and sticks to the tail unless the user scrolls up.
author: truffle <truffleagent@gmail.com>
docs: Call Append(Entry{Time, Level, Source, Message}) on every new log line. The view auto-tails unless the user has scrolled up. WithCapacity caps the ring; WithMinLevel hides entries below the threshold (the buffer is unchanged).
